---
title: "Schedule - Introduction to Python"
sidebar: false
toc: false
---

# Workshop Schedule


## Day 1

| Time |  Topic  | Instructor |
|:-----------:|:----------:|:--------:|
| 10:00 - 10:15 | [Workshop introduction](../slides/workshop_intro_slides.pdf) |  Instructor_name |
| 10:15 - 10:45 | [Lesson 04](../lessons/01_setting_up.qmd) | Instructor_name |
| 10:45 - 10:50 | Break | |
| 10:50 - 11:25 | [Lesson 05](../lessons/02_variables.qmd) | Instructor_name |
| 11:55 - 12:00 | Overview of self-learning materials and homework submission | Instructor_name |

### Before the next class:

I. Please **study the contents** and **work through all the code** within the following lessons:
 
   1. [Lesson 06](../lessons/06_lesson.qmd)
      
      :::{.callout-note collapse="true" title="Click here for a preview of this lesson"}
      Brief description of the lesson.
      
      In this lesson, you will:
      
        - Learning Objective 1
        - Learning Objective 2
        - Learning Objective 3
      :::

   2. [Lesson 07](../lessons/07_lesson.qmd)
      
      :::{.callout-note collapse="true" title="Click here for a preview of this lesson"}
      Brief description of the lesson.
      
      In this lesson, you will:
      
        - Learning Objective 1
        - Learning Objective 2
        - Learning Objective 3
      :::

II. **Submit your work**:
   * Each lesson above contains exercises; please go through each of them.
   * **Submit your answers** to the exercises using [this Google form]() on **the day *before* the next class**.
   
### Questions?
* ***If you get stuck due to an error*** while running code in the lesson, [email us](mailto:hbctraining@hsph.harvard.edu) 

***

## Day 2

| Time |  Topic  | Instructor |
|:-----------:|:----------:|:--------:|
| 10:00 - 10:30 | Self-learning lessons discussion | All |
| 10:30 - 10:55 | [Lesson 08](../lessons/08_lesson.qmd) | Instructor_name |
| 10:55 - 11:00 | Break | |
| 11:00 - 11:55 | [Lesson 09](../lessons/09_lesson.qmd) | Instructor_name |
| 11:55 - 12:00 | Overview of self-learning materials and homework submission | Instructor_name |

### Before the next class:

I. Please **study the contents** and **work through all the code** within the following lessons:
 
   1. [Lesson 10](../lessons/10_lesson.qmd)

      :::{.callout-note collapse="true" title="Click here for a preview of this lesson"}
      Brief description of the lesson.
      
      In this lesson, you will:
      
        - Learning Objective 1
        - Learning Objective 2
        - Learning Objective 3
      :::

   2. [Lesson 11](../lessons/11_lesson.qmd)

      :::{.callout-note collapse="true" title="Click here for a preview of this lesson"}
      Brief description of the lesson.
      
      In this lesson, you will:
      
        - Learning Objective 1
        - Learning Objective 2
        - Learning Objective 3
      :::
         
II. **Submit your work**:
   * Each lesson above contains exercises; please go through each of them.
   * **Submit your answers** to the exercises using [this Google form]() on **the day *before* the next class**.
   
### Questions?
* ***If you get stuck due to an error*** while running code in the lesson, [email us](mailto:hbctraining@hsph.harvard.edu) 

***

## Day 3

| Time |  Topic  | Instructor |
|:-----------:|:----------:|:--------:|
| 10:00 - 10:30 | Self-learning lessons discussion | All |
| 10:30 - 10:55 | [Lesson 12](../lessons/12_lesson.qmd) | Instructor_name |
| 10:55 - 11:00 | Break | |
| 11:00 - 11:55 | [Lesson 13](../lessons/13_lesson.qmd) | Instructor_name |
| 11:55 - 12:00 | Overview of self-learning materials and homework submission | Instructor_name |

### Before the next class:

I. Please **study the contents** and **work through all the code** within the following lessons:
 
   1. [Lesson 14](../lessons/14_lesson.qmd)

      :::{.callout-note collapse="true" title="Click here for a preview of this lesson"}
      Brief description of the lesson.
      
      In this lesson, you will:
      
        - Learning Objective 1
        - Learning Objective 2
        - Learning Objective 3
      :::

   2. [Lesson 15](../lessons/15_lesson.qmd)

      :::{.callout-note collapse="true" title="Click here for a preview of this lesson"}
      Brief description of the lesson.
      
      In this lesson, you will:
      
        - Learning Objective 1
        - Learning Objective 2
        - Learning Objective 3
      :::
         
II. **Submit your work**:
   * Each lesson above contains exercises; please go through each of them.
   * **Submit your answers** to the exercises using [this Google form]() on **the day *before* the next class**.
   
### Questions?
* ***If you get stuck due to an error*** while running code in the lesson, [email us](mailto:hbctraining@hsph.harvard.edu) 

***


## Day 4

| Time |  Topic  | Instructor |
|:-----------:|:----------:|:--------:|
| 10:00 - 10:30 | Self-learning lessons discussion | All |
| 10:30 - 10:55 | [Lesson 16](../lessons/16_lesson.qmd) | Instructor_name |
| 10:55 - 11:00 | Break | |
| 11:00 - 11:55 | [Lesson 17](../lessons/17_lesson.qmd) | Instructor_name |
| 11:55 - 12:00 | Overview of self-learning materials and homework submission | Instructor_name |

***

## Resources

- [Additional Resource 1](link_to_additonal_resource_1)
- [Additional Resource 2](link_to_additonal_resource_2)
- [Additional Resource 3](link_to_additonal_resource_3)
